title: Senior Financial Analyst - Canara Bank Capital India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Canara Bank Capital India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Join the Canara Bank Capital India family as a Senior Financial Analyst in Tiruchirappalli. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Canara Bank Capital India:
Canara Bank Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Tiruchirappalli, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Canara Bank Capital India!
